product.title: NIV, Foundation Study Bible, Leathersoft, Brown, Red Letter
product.description: The key features of a study Bible in a convenient, compact, and concise formThe NIV Foundation Study Bible in the world’s most popular modern-English Bible translation—the New International Version—features an approachable and easy-to-use layout, with straightforward and broad study notes that help you discover the beauty and truth of God's Word. Concise study notes provide helpful comments on passages of Scripture, while theological notes draw attention to important doctrinal content in the Bible and are indexed in the back of the Bible. Translators' footnotes offer clarification and information about the original-language texts. Intended for both beginning and experienced students of Scripture who want a Bible that contains the key features of a study Bible in a convenient, compact, and concise form, the NIV Foundation Study Bible is perfect for students, church leaders, and homeschool use.Features:Complete text of the accurate, readable, and clear New International Version (NIV)Introductions provide valuable background information for each book of the BibleCross reference systemIn-text subject headingsVerse-by-verse study notesNIV concise concordanceFull color Bible mapsWords of Jesus in redLeathersoft cover lays flat when open8-point type size

reviewsInfo.customersSay: Customers find the study Bible helpful for understanding the Bible, particularly appreciating the key verses before each book for contextual understanding and the excellent notes that preface each book. Moreover, the Bible is easy to read and understand, with one customer noting it's comfortable to read without straining eyes, and customers consider it good value for biblical study. However, opinions about the print size are mixed, with some finding it nice while others say it's really small.

reviews.reviewText: Beautiful bible with some great notes and insights to help you understand
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on January 13, 2026

reviews.reviewText: I absolutely love this bible. Easy to read, has two ribbons, easy to understand, has notes on the page to learn more about that scripture.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 11, 2026

reviews.reviewText: I wrote the review below shortly after purchasing this Bible and as I was reading it. Now, I've read it cover-to-cover and well into my second reading. I now can verify this Bible's wonderful properties. My comments below are still valid. If you, as a potential buyer, really want to know the character of God explained, then please get this Bible. As you read, the footnotes explain in detail what the chapters of the books mean and how to interpret the Bible as a Christian who wants to truly understand God. This study Bible make this historical and holy book so interesting to read that I read it every day of the year, sometimes for up to three hours. I now truly appreciate the wisdom and knowledge found in the Bible and my only regret that I had not discovered this Bible many years ago. It is my firm belief that everyone needs a valid interpretation of the Bible as it is being read, because reading a Bible without study notes means that it cannot be interpreted correctly since the footnotes are written by scholars of the Bible. Please read this Bible and become a better person. Excellent study Bible! Excellent notes that preface each book. Footnotes are very good and explain the verses. Far superior to a plain Bible in that the notes clarify all that is written. Can anyone truly understand the Bible without explanation?
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on November 15, 2024

reviews.reviewText: Couldn’t be happier with this bible. Bought for my husband! Perfect size for him to carry to work and church.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on November 7, 2025

reviews.reviewText: It was delivered on the estimated delivery date, in perfect condition, not bends, tears or scratches. The print is a little to small, but the red writing helped understand when Jesus was talking. In KJV (king James version) all the writing is black making it hard to know when Jesus is talking in the New Testament. The NIV makes it easy by having Jesus words in red as everyone else in black, making it much easier to know who is speaking. The wording is also much easier to understand as I don't need to read the same text over and over again to find out what it means. The NIV makes it easier to read and easy to undusted as it comes with a dictionary of words we don't use anymore but the bible has in it. I have liked this version of the bible, I bought one of my friends it as he is able to read it more fluently.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on September 19, 2024

reviews.reviewTitle: A great purchase for a great bible!
reviews.reviewText: Amazon thank you!! What a great bible for the low price! I haven’t found such quality from any other place at this price.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on October 10, 2025

reviews.reviewText: This bible is almost perfect to me. I wanted to give it five stars but it falls short in two places. One, it only has an 8 pt font which is borderline too small for my old eyes and second, it only has one ribbon book marker. I really prefer two ribbon book markers but that’s just me. This bible has just the right amount of concise verse by verse notes and book introductions for light bible study. For a deeper dive I grab my NIV Full Study Bible. Even though the NIV Foundation Study Bible lacks in the two places I mentioned, I’m keeping it.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on November 26, 2025
Reviewed in the United States on December 31, 2025

reviews.reviewText: I love this bible. I read it and use it every day. The study notes are great and give insight to the time period as well as insights into the context of the verses. Each chapter also begins with the theme and purpose of the book as well as rough time period of when it was written. Finally the NIV translation is my personal favourite. Easy to read and accurate.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United Kingdom on March 15, 2025

reviews.reviewTitle: You can’t go wrong with this!
reviews.reviewText: You cannot go wrong with this! The page quality, text size, references everything is perfect!
I got this for my boyfriends birthday he loves it and says it’s very helpful to learn a lot more behind a scripture
Well made Bible, perfect for a first Bible.

reviews.reviewTitle: The bet book in the world
